# phala_nodes (Data Source)

Lists available worker nodes (teepods) for CVM placement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `region` (String) Optional region filter (for example: us-west).
- `support_onchain_kms` (Boolean) Optional filter by on-chain KMS support.

### Read-Only

- `nodes` (Attributes List) Available nodes for placement (`node_id` maps to resource `node_id`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Read-Only:

- `device_id` (String)
- `fmspc` (String)
- `images` (List of String)
- `listed` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `node_id` (Number)
- `region` (String)
- `remaining_cvm_slots` (Number)
- `remaining_memory_mb` (Number)
- `remaining_vcpu` (Number)
- `resource_score` (Number)
- `support_onchain_kms` (Boolean)
